summary: Strong module design with approved PowerShell verbs, [CmdletBinding()], parameter validation, and proper error handling. Workflow follows YAML best practices (pinned actions@v4, least-privilege perms, job deps, pwsh shell). Notable gaps: (1) bump-version.ps1 line 46: -Quiet parameter defined but never checked—dead code; (2) SemanticVersionBumper.psm1 lacks Set-StrictMode -Version Latest at module scope (best practice); (3) Workflow fixture selection (lines 36–54) is verbose—logic could move to a helper script. Implicit fixture dir structure (fixtures/$fixture/{VERSION|package.json,commits.txt}) not documented in workflow. Module's pure-function design enables good testability; clear separation of concerns throughout.
